optimized_name: Binary class for breast cancer recurrence after n years
schemanode_description: binary classification label that indicates if the patient had a breast cancer recurrence event or not after n years. The time to event is not defined by the dataset, could be 10 years or something else
comment: It was not clear what year span was considered. CUI references 10 years. Because there is no other time span, I assume that it is the most common timespan and was also used to construct the dataset

schemanode_description: Groups of reported patient age in year at visit time. The years are grouped in timespans of 10 years (10-19, 20-29, 30-39, 40-49, 50-59, 60-69, 70-79, 80-89, 90-99)
comment: This is the general patient age. The fact that it is converted in classes is not represented in the CUI

schemanode_description: menopausal state of the patient. Can be either menopause before or after 40 years or pre menopause. Is given in three classes (lt40, ge40, premeno)
comment: is a combination of three possible medical codes. I put the general "Menopause finding" ID here
Could also be C0804677 (which is an attribute)

schemanode_description: Number of involved lymph nodes. Given in the following classes (0-2, 3-5, 6-8, 9-11, 12-14, 15-17, 18-20, 21-23, 24-26, 27-29, 30-32, 33-35, 36-39)
Indicates if extracapsular extension (ECE) is present for the given patient

optimized_name: histological degree of the malignancy score
schemanode_description: histological degree of the malignancy score
comment: Could also be C4688304 or C5548600

schemanode_description: Side of the body where the breast carcinoma is located. It is assumed that the cancer is unilateral
comment: The feature is not really defined in UMLS, but the two options (left breast [C5546407], right breast [C5546406 ]) are defined. I now but the CUI for "Unilateral Breast Carcinoma". But this could also be C4018978

optimized_name: quadrant where primary breast cancer is located
schemanode_description: Quadrant where the primary carcinoma of the breast is located
comment: These are the options for the values (upper|inner [C5769803],  upper|outer [C5769805], lower|outer [C5769806], lower|inner [C5769804]). I use the higher level concept as ground truth "Primary carcinoma of breast"

schemanode_description: Indicates the procedure of radioation therapy for the patient. The values are binary (yes/no).
comment: This is the procedure of radiation therapy now. Not a perfect fit, because it lacks the option for binary classification
